PROP-baseauction-inv-016.text: s_entered must be reset to false after bid() completes, even if callback reverts.
PROP-baseauction-inv-016.assertion: forall bid() completion: s_entered == false (unlock always executes)

locations.note: s_entered set to false at line 457; no try/catch — if callback reverts it propagates and guard is not needed to reset
